3110980.name: Terracian Trails: Financial Frontier
3110980.description:
Explore the region of Venture Valley and discover the world beyond in Terracian Trails: Financial Frontier! Trek across iconic scenes reminiscent of the American Wild West, and uncover the secrets of Wild Wood, a mysterious and fantastical forest of magical origins. Engage in food cultivation, foraging, horse care, geological excavation, town management, wealth accumulation, and more, as you observe the world around you change for the better through your actions of working with the the inhabitants of both regions to develop a shared economy!

Embark on a journey to learn the fundamentals of financial literacy through the practice of starting a cottage industry, managing resources, restoring the environment, and participating in a multi-regional economy. Financial Frontier's numerous activities are designed to emulate nature-based play and exploration, and encourage the development of an understanding of complex financial concepts and the natural world.

Players Can Expect to:

• Experience World Exploration on Foot or Horseback

• Practice Regenerative Plant and Land Cultivation

• Exercise Day-to-Day Business Operation and Management Standards

• Support Multi-Regional Economic Growth

• Strengthen an Understanding of Responsible Banking Practices

• Participate in Community Engagement, Improvement, and Town Building

• Learn to Distinguish Between 50+ Cultivated and Wild Plants

• Craft 100+ Recipes

• Master 150+ Financial and Science Terms

• Improve the World of Terracia Through Positive Action
3110980.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
